title: draba pusilla
intro: Draba pusilla, also known as small whitlow-grass or yellow alyssum, is a small, annual plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and flowers, which contain glucosinolates that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Consuming Draba pusilla has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be cautioned due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
